description: Create an automated transition responder for MegaCorp clients. Create a folder named 'MegaCorp Archive' under Local Folders. Create a message template with the subject 'Project Transition Notice' and a body containing the phrases 'transitioned off the MegaCorp account' and 'Please direct future inquiries to Sarah'. Configure an enabled message filter for Local Folders named 'MegaCorp Transition' that triggers when 'From' contains '@megacorp.com'. The filter must reply with the 'Project Transition Notice' template, forward the message to 'sarah.connor@example.com', and move the message to the 'MegaCorp Archive' folder.

expected_body_phrases: please direct future inquiries to sarah
